tree.name: Nickeil Alexander-Walker
tree.narrative: **Nickeil Alexander-Walker** was a low-cost pickup from Minnesota in July 2025 — the Hawks sent cash and a Cleveland 2027 second-rounder for the Canadian scoring guard. A nice bench addition without giving up any real assets.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded cash and a 2027 2nd round draft pick (CLE own) to Timberwolves for Nickeil Alexander-Walker.
tree.note: Canadian guard, scoring spark off the bench. Minnesota also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.narrative: A Cleveland 2027 second-round pick, sent to Minnesota as partial payment for **Nickeil Alexander-Walker**.
assetsGivenUp.note: Cleveland's 2027 2nd-round pick, sent to Minnesota in NAW trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.narrative: Cash sent to Minnesota alongside a second-round pick for NAW.
